---
title: "Blog"
toc: true
listing:
  contents: "posts/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
  feed: true
format:
  html:
    # Subscribe widget only on this page (see subscribe.html; Quarto blog “Subscriptions”)
    margin-header: subscribe.html
---

Welcome to the `carecodeconnect` blog! 🤗

*"Revisioning data science for the age of AI"*

New posts will appear below!
